Title: 270737-AC1: GPS Input and Mapping / Tools Menu / Set Coordinates Tool Availability

Step Action: PRE-REQ: ENV QuickDraw application is installed
Launch the ENV QuickDraw application.
Step Expected: Model space(Gray) and Canvas(white) space should be displayed.

Step Action: From the Home screen, select 'New File', press 'Create', select a save location, and press 'Save'.
Step Expected: A new blank drawing opens and is displayed on the Canvas.

Step Action: Draw a simple shape (e.g., rectangle) on the Canvas and select it.
Step Expected: The shape is created and selected with selection handles visible.

Step Action: Open the Tools dropdown in the top menu.
Step Expected: The Set Coordinates tool is visible and enabled for the selected object.

Step Action: Select Set Coordinates.
Step Expected: The Set Coordinates dialog opens displaying Latitude and Longitude labels, Apply and Cancel buttons, and input fields.

Step Action: Close the dialog.
Step Expected: The dialog closes without changes.

Step Action: Close the QuickDraw application.

Title: 270737-020: GPS Input and Mapping / Coordinate Entry / Apply Valid Signed Decimal Coordinates

Step Action: PRE-REQ: ENV QuickDraw application is installed
Launch the ENV QuickDraw application
Step Expected: Model space(Gray) and Canvas(white) space should be displayed

Step Action: From the Home screen, select 'New File', press 'Create', select a save location, and press 'Save'.
Step Expected: A new blank drawing opens and is displayed on the Canvas.

Step Action: Draw a simple shape (e.g., rectangle or triangle) on the Canvas
Step Expected: The shape is created and displayed on the Canvas.

Step Action: Select the drawn object
Step Expected: Selection handles appear around the selected object.

Step Action: Open Tools Menu and select Set Coordinates.
Step Expected: The Set Coordinates dialog opens.

Step Action: Enter a valid positive Latitude value in decimal format (e.g., 48.12345).
Step Expected: The Latitude value is accepted.

Step Action: Enter a valid negative Longitude value in decimal format (e.g., -123.98765).
Step Expected: The Longitude value is accepted.

Step Action: Select Apply
Step Expected: Coordinates are accepted without validation errors and applied to the selected object.

Step Action: Reopen Tools > Set Coordinates for the same object.
Step Expected: The dialog opens displaying the current coordinate values.

Step Action: Enter a Longitude value outside -180 to 180
Step Expected: The invalid Longitude value is entered.

Step Action: Select Apply
Step Expected: Longitude field is flagged as invalid; coordinates are not applied

Step Action: Close the Set Coordinates dialog.
Close QuickDraw application
